implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Adds a footer with current year and 'BrewBoard' to src/app/page.tsx using a fragment wrapper. Meets both acceptance criteria with a minimal 5-line diff and no extraneous changes.

requirements.notes: Footer is added at the bottom of the page and contains the current year (via new Date().getFullYear()) and 'BrewBoard' text. Both acceptance criteria satisfied.

correctness.notes: Valid JSX: wraps the previous single <main> root in a fragment and adds a sibling <footer>. No type or integration issues; renders correctly in a Next.js app router page.

minimality.notes: 5-line addition touching only the one file specified by the spec. No refactors, no tests, no docs — exactly as requested.

code_quality.notes: Tailwind classes are consistent with the existing main container (max-w-4xl mx-auto, stone palette). Minor nit: footer indentation inside the fragment doesn't match the surrounding two-space style, but it's readable.

risk.notes: Semantic <footer> element is good for a11y. The footer sits outside <main>, which is appropriate. Using new Date().getFullYear() at render is fine for a client/server component here; negligible risk.
